title: Email Dashboards

posts.author: Mariolsen (Mari Olsen)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree this would be a great feature to ensure data is captured at different stages. This would be great for our reporting!

posts.author: andrew.marshall (Andrew Marshall)
posts.cookedHtml: @amber I attended Elevate NYC this year and on the MainStage it was mentioned that this is available now to Enterprise members. I don’t have it, though. Is it on the roadmap?
